# STRAT.069 ? Bridges' Transition Model

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** change_management
**Domain:** CHANGE_MANAGEMENT
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Change vs transition; ending/neutral zone/beginning; psychological process; letting go; identity shift; time in wilderness

## Application
Distinguish change from transition; honor endings; support neutral zone; celebrate new beginnings; acknowledge psychological process; patience

## Key Values
- Psychological process
- Endings matter
- Neutral zone
- New beginning
- Time allowance

## Tags
philosophy, strategic-framework, change_management

## Notes
Strategic framework ingested into philosophy library per operator mapping rule.
